channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Swift (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Swift nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 momenbasel/PureMac (1042 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: momenbasel

📝 Repository: momenbasel/PureMac

📄 Descrizione: Free, open-source macOS cleaner. CleanMyMac alternative with zero telemetry. Native SwiftUI, scheduled auto-cleaning, Xcode/Homebrew/system cache cleanup. MIT licensed.

⭐ Stelle: 1042

🍴 Forks: 50

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: cache-cleaner cleanmymac cleanup disk-cleaner disk-space homebrew mac-utility macos macos-app macos-cleaner macosx native oss osx privacy swift swiftui system-cleaner xcode-cleaner

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-08T12:59:29Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-14T04:43:05Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: lzhgus

📝 Repository: lzhgus/Capso

📄 Descrizione: Open-source screenshot and screen recording for macOS. The free, native alternative to CleanShot X. Built with Swift 6.0 and SwiftUI.

⭐ Stelle: 407

🍴 Forks: 18

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: annotation cleanshot-alternative macos ocr open-source screen-recording screenshot swift swiftui

]]>

item.title: 📝 dominikmartn/ProgressiveBlurHeader (384 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: dominikmartn

📝 Repository: dominikmartn/ProgressiveBlurHeader

📄 Descrizione: Drop-in SwiftUI component for sticky headers with progressive blur — like Apple Music, Photos, and App Store. Content scrolls underneath with increasing blur, never clipped.

⭐ Stelle: 384

🍴 Forks: 16

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: blur ios progressive-blur sticky-header swift swift-package swiftui uikit

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-09T04:50:25Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-15T00:03:00Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 godblessamki/Workout-Tracker (11 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: godblessamki

📝 Repository: godblessamki/Workout-Tracker

📄 Descrizione: IronTrack is a native iOS workout tracker built with SwiftUI and SwiftData. It allows users to create custom workout routines and exercises. During active sessions, it automatically displays the maximum weight and reps from the previous session for instant progress tracking. Designed with MVVM architecture, it offers a fast, local-first experience.

⭐ Stelle: 11

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-19T09:09:02Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-20T23:01:27Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 lopleec/Sc (11 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: lopleec

📝 Repository: lopleec/Sc

📄 Descrizione: ☕️ Sc is a lightweight macOS overlay chat app for windowed games. It creates private IRC-backed sessions with shareable invite codes and lets you toggle a lower-left in-game-style chat bar with Command + /.

⭐ Stelle: 11

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

item.title: 📝 nagisa77/OpenBoringBar (11 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: nagisa77

📝 Repository: nagisa77/OpenBoringBar

📄 Descrizione: OpenBoringBar is an open-source implementation inspired by [boringbar.app](https://boringbar.app). Our priority is to deliver a reliable, bottom-taskbar experience for macOS multi-display users in a fully transparent codebase.

⭐ Stelle: 11

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: Swift
